title: eriogonum spectabile
intro: Eriogonum spectabile, also known as the globemallow or buffalo berry, is a flowering plant species native to the Great Plains region of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of globemallow include its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help prevent cell damage and promote overall well-being. Globemallow can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health conditions, including colds, fever, and skin irritations.
